name: Common Mistakes After a Forklift Tip-over Accident

step.name: Step 1
step.text: If a forklift tips or crashes, follow these steps. 1. Seek medical help even for 'minor' bumps. 2. Take photos of the forklift, the floor, and any debris. 3. Get contact info for coworkers who saw it. These details disappear fast once the warehouse cleans up. Having this proof makes getting your settlement much easier later on. Call us at 801-746-0290 for a quick chat.

description: Common Mistakes After a Forklift Tip-over Accident - Boise, West Valley City, West Jordan, Sandy, Murray, Millcreek, South Salt Lake, North Salt Lake, Bountiful, Midvale, Taylorsville, Cottonwood Heights, Holladay, Draper, Riverton, Farmington, Centerville
